# Session Learning Report

<!-- Generated by: 01/context-engineering + 04-preference-and-memory -->
<!-- Purpose: Capture what the system learned during a session for continuous self-improvement. -->
<!-- Trigger: End of every significant session (multi-prompt builds, debugging sessions, new patterns discovered). -->
<!-- Destination: Append to MEMORY.md under "## Session Learnings" or create standalone in docs/learnings/ -->

## Session Metadata

- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Project:** [domain/project name]
- **Duration:** [approximate time span]
- **Prompts:** [number of user prompts in session]
- **Primary task:** [one-line summary of what was accomplished]

## What Worked Well

<!-- Patterns, approaches, or decisions that produced good results. -->
<!-- These might become permanent skill updates. -->

1. **[Pattern/Approach]** — [Why it worked, what it produced]
   - Context: [When to use this again]
   - Evidence: [Specific outcome that proves it worked]

2. **[Pattern/Approach]** — [Why it worked, what it produced]
   - Context: [When to use this again]
   - Evidence: [Specific outcome that proves it worked]

## What Failed or Was Slow

<!-- Anti-patterns, wrong assumptions, or approaches that cost time. -->
<!-- These should be encoded as warnings in skills. -->

1. **[What went wrong]** — [Root cause]
   - Time cost: [How much time was wasted]
   - Fix: [What should have been done instead]
   - Skill gap: [Which skill should be updated to prevent this]

2. **[What went wrong]** — [Root cause]
   - Time cost: [How much time was wasted]
   - Fix: [What should have been done instead]
   - Skill gap: [Which skill should be updated to prevent this]

## New Patterns Discovered

<!-- Reusable solutions found during this session that don't exist in current skills. -->

1. **[Pattern Name]**
   - Problem it solves: [description]
   - Implementation: [brief code/approach summary]
   - Applicable when: [conditions for reuse]
   - Should update skill: [skill number and name]

| Preference | Confidence | Source | Scope |
|-----------|-----------|--------|-------|
| [Preference description] | high/medium/low | [correction/inference/explicit] | global/project |

## Technical Discoveries

<!-- API quirks, library behaviors, platform limitations found during the session. -->

1. **[Discovery]**
   - Relevant to: [which projects/stacks]
   - Documentation: [link if found]

## Metrics

<!-- Quantitative outcomes from this session. -->

- Deploys: [count]
- Test failures fixed: [count]
- Visual QA iterations: [count]
- Issues found by AI vision: [count]
- Time from first prompt to production: [duration]
- Lines of code generated: [approximate]

## Action Items

<!-- Things to do AFTER this session to improve future sessions. -->

- [ ] Update skill [##]: [what to change]
- [ ] Add to CONVENTIONS.md: [new convention]
- [ ] Add to MEMORY.md: [persistent memory item]
- [ ] File issue: [if something needs deeper work]
- [ ] Test assumption: [something to validate next time]

## Confidence Assessment

<!-- How well did the system perform overall? -->

- **Task completion:** [complete | partial | failed]
- **Quality of output:** [excellent | good | acceptable | poor]
- **Efficiency:** [optimal | good | could improve | wasteful]
- **Biggest bottleneck:** [what slowed things down most]
- **If repeated tomorrow:** [what would change]
